characters.appearance: Mid-20s male, medium build, brown complexion. Dark hair styled back, beard, wearing glasses.

characters.appearance: Mid-20s male, medium build, brown complexion. Dark hair styled back, beard, wearing glasses.
characters.wardrobe: Grey short-sleeve polo shirt, blue jeans.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: अगर office में growth चाहिए, तो listen up. [If you want growth in the office, then listen up.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the target audience (working professionals) by addressing career growth directly.
- Sets an engaging, practical tone immediately.
- Establishes the core motivation for learning spoken English.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: अगर office में growth चाहिए, तो listen up.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: सिर्फ emails में English लिखना काफी नहीं है। [Just writing English in emails is not enough.]
Character A says: असली impact English बोलने से आता है। [Real impact comes from speaking English.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Contrasts passive written English with active spoken English.
- Highlights the gap in the user's current skill set.
- Visually supports the transition from typing to confident speaking.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: सिर्फ emails में English लिखना काफी नहीं है। असली impact English बोलने से आता है।

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: और fluent English बोलने का secret है Supernova. [And the secret to speaking fluent English is Supernova.]
Character A says: क्योंकि यहाँ आप रटते नहीं, बोलते हैं। [Because here you don't memorize, you speak.]
Character A says: हमारे AI tutor के साथ interview और office meetings की रोज़ practice करें। [Practice for interviews and office meetings daily with our AI tutor.]
Character A says: वो भी बिना किसी झिझक के। [That too without any hesitation.]
Character A says: अगर आप अब भी सिर्फ grammar पढ़ रहे हैं, तो आप पीछे छूट रहे हैं। [If you are still just studying grammar, you are being left behind.]
Character A says: आज ही Supernova download करें। [Download Supernova today.]
Character A says: और पूरे confidence के साथ English बोलें। [And speak English with full confidence.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces Supernova as the practical solution to the spoken English problem.
- Highlights key features: AI tutor and real-world practice (interviews/meetings) without judgment.
- Ends with a strong, encouraging call-to-action to download the app and speak confidently.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Fluent English बोलने का secret है Supernova. AI tutor के साथ रोज़ practice करें. आज ही Supernova download करें.
